reviews.comment:
Cuidado con las primos! Una promo de gatorade me fue cobrada sin el descuento alegando que la poder no entraba en la misma, a pesar que el cartel dice de combinar cualquier producto. Me devolvieron el dinero pero dejaron el cartel aún sin tener, según ellos, los productos de la promo. Eso no se hace.

(Translated by Google)
Beware of scammers! I was charged for a Gatorade promotion without the discount, claiming the product wasn't included, even though the sign said to mix and match any product. They refunded my money but left the sign up even though, according to them, they didn't have the promotional products. That's not right.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNeVlENUxBEAE
